sentences.sentence:
The model was trained for 100 epochs on a single NVIDIA 
    V100 GPU.

We trained our model using the Adam optimizer with a learning rate of 0.001 
    and batch size of 32.

We used the CIFAR-10 dataset split into 45,000 training, 5,000 
    validation, and 10,000 test samples.
Random seed was set to 42 for reproducibility.
